markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review analytics, resolve data access, and align on new projects.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Organic traffic is recovering,** with blog clicks up 22% MoM, reversing a year-long decline and validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**GrowthX now has Google Search Console access** for `explore.flosum.com`, unblocking page-level conversion tracking to connect content to revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**A new "Cloud DevOps" product launches internally Dec 17,** creating new content needs; its messaging will differentiate it from the native product.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [**GrowthX will create shorter, PPC-optimized blog versions** to support ABM campaigns, starting with two refreshes next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)

## Topics

### Analytics & Data Access

  - [**Organic Traffic Recovery:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Site-wide traffic is reversing a year-long decline, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Blog clicks are up 22% MoM and 76% from the two-month low.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Growth is broad, with all content clusters seeing 28–87% MoM growth.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [LLM-driven traffic is trending up.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Top referring pages (e.g., pricing, compliance) show where LLMs don't provide sufficient answers, driving users to the site.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Backlinks & Domain Authority:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [GrowthX is driving high-quality backlinks (DA 60–80) to target blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [Ahrefs shows the domain authority has grown 3 points since the engagement began.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Data Access Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Problem:** Flosum could not provide page-level conversion data, blocking analysis of content's revenue impact.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Cause:** The data exists in Google Search Console (GSC) for `explore.flosum.com` (Marketo CNAME), but Flosum lacked the expertise to extract it.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**Solution:** Flosum granted GSC access to `jakub@growthxlabs.com` and `team@growthx.ai`. GrowthX will now pull the data and investigate any indexing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

### New Initiatives & Content Needs

  - [**New Product: Cloud DevOps**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
      - [**Launch:** Internal announcement on Dec 17.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
      - [**Product:** A non-native Salesforce DevOps solution.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Lower cost for Flosum (avoids Salesforce licensing) and more flexible for customers.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
          - [**Status:** Two deals closed; feature parity with the native product is expected by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [**Messaging:** Differentiate from the native product, which is for regulated industries.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
          - [**Guideline:** Do not disparage either product.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing for PPC**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
      - [**Need:** Shorter, PPC-optimized versions of long-form blogs for ABM campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
      - [**Execution:** GrowthX will create these versions.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
          - [**Format:** Infographics or short snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2159.0)
          - [**SEO:** Published on a non-indexed page (e.g., resources section) to prevent cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will refresh two existing posts next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging Update**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**Status:** Finalizing the core narrative and tagline.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**Tagline:** "Turn Salesforce complexity into confidence with Flosum."](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)
      - [**Rollout:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
          - [**Dec:** GTM teams will be certified and will pressure-test the messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
          - [**Next Week:** The core narrative will be shared with Flosum's Saakshi Jain.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
          - [**EOW Next Week:** The full messaging deck (including pillars) will be shared with GrowthX and Outshine.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)

### Process Updates

  - [**New Content OS Interface:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [A simplified Notion interface for Flosum to approve topics and articles.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce complexity and streamline the approval workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [**New Project Board:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [A central board to track all projects (pending, in progress, complete).](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve visibility and alignment across teams.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Analyze `explore.flosum.com` data in GSC to enable page-level conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Refresh two blog posts for PPC campaigns next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
      - [Review the new Content OS interface and project board.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Flosum:**](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
      - [Share the new strategic messaging deck with GrowthX and Outshine by EOW next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EfuEkovkp9deLAEf_HX4UFVLMyyub7_R?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
